🧭 AMC scores your AI agent's trustworthiness from actual behavior — not claims. Think: credit score for AI.  Get started: amc quickscore

What to do next

Score Trend
Your trust score over time — spot regressions and improvements

Pack pass rates
Approvals
Human-reviewed decisions
Value
Business outcomes
0.0 / 5.0
Dimensions
How your agent scores across each trust area
Trust Radar
Visual map across all 5 dimensions — a perfect agent fills the pentagon
Question Heatmap
113 behavioral questions grouped by dimension — click any row to inspect
Question Detail
🔍Click a question above to inspect it
Assurance
Automated behavioral tests that verify your agent works correctly
Assurance Packs
Each pack tests a specific failure mode — green means your agent passes
Failure-Risk Indices
Composite risk scores across behavioral categories
Evidence
Execution proof that makes your trust score cryptographically verifiable
Evidence Gaps
Missing execution proof — fixing these gives the biggest score jump
Improvement Plan
Step-by-step checklist to close your evidence gaps
Terminal
Run AMC commands, manage agents, and view studio status
